template_used: Template B - With Security Agreement Reference
use_case: Digital estate administration. HeirSure LLC acts as fiduciary/custodian for benefactor digital assets under UCC SS 12-105(e) acknowledging custodian arrangement.
multi_state_note: Protocol filed under New York law only. Multi-state expansion planned for Phase 4 (2028+) pending state-specific legal review per jurisdiction. Not all Article 12 adopting states have identical enactments.
notes: Pilot Filing 3 - Digital estate/inheritance scenario. HeirSure LLC natural use case. Proves protocol works for custody/fiduciary arrangements. NY only - multi-state legally unvalidated.
